name: WebProbe Graph Analyzer
description: Phase 3: Analyzes site graphs to compute structural metrics, detect broken links, identify auth boundary violations, find timing outliers, enumerate prime paths, and integrate security findings. Converts internal SiteGraph to networkx for graph algorithm execution.

functions.name: _build_nx_graph
functions.description: Converts a SiteGraph to a networkx DiGraph by adding all nodes and edges from the graph structure.
postconditions: Returned DiGraph contains all node IDs from graph.nodes
Returned DiGraph contains all edges with (source, target) from graph.edges

functions.name: _compute_graph_metrics
functions.description: Computes structural metrics on the graph including orphan nodes, dead ends, unreachable nodes, strongly connected components, cyclomatic complexity, max depth, and edge coverage.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The site graph containing nodes and edges

inputs.name: G
inputs.description: The networkx representation of the graph

postconditions: Returns GraphMetrics with all fields populated
orphan_nodes excludes root node
edge_coverage is in range [0.0, 1.0]
cyclomatic_complexity = n_edges - n_nodes + 2 * n_components

functions.name: _find_broken_links
functions.description: Finds edges whose target node has a failing HTTP status (not 200-399) or no successful capture. External links (targets not in graph) are skipped as out-of-scope.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The site graph to analyze for broken links

postconditions: Returns list of BrokenLink objects for same-origin links that fail
External links (target not in graph.nodes) are excluded
Only links with target nodes that have no successful HTTP status (200-399) are included

functions.name: _find_auth_violations
functions.description: Finds pages that require authentication but are accessible anonymously (anonymous capture returned HTTP 200-299).

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The site graph to analyze for auth violations

postconditions: Returns list of AuthBoundaryViolation for nodes with requires_auth=True but accessible anonymously
Only nodes with requires_auth=True are checked
Violations reported only if anonymous capture has HTTP status 200-299

functions.name: _find_timing_outliers
functions.description: Finds nodes with timing metrics significantly above the mean (absolute z-score > 2.0). Analyzes duration_ms, ttfb_ms, dom_content_loaded_ms, and load_event_ms.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The site graph to analyze for timing outliers

postconditions: Returns list of TimingOutlier for metrics with |z-score| > 2.0
Metrics with < 3 samples are skipped
Metrics with stddev = 0 are skipped
Only positive timing values (> 0) are included

functions.name: _enumerate_prime_paths
functions.description: Enumerates prime paths (maximal simple paths with bounded loop traversal). Limits path length to min(n_nodes, 15) and total paths to max_paths (default 1000) for tractability.

inputs.name: max_loop
inputs.description: Maximum loop iterations (currently unused in implementation)

inputs.name: max_paths
inputs.description: Maximum number of paths to return

error_cases.name: NodeNotFound
error_cases.condition: If networkx cannot find a node (caught and skipped)

error_cases.name: NetworkXError
error_cases.condition: If networkx encounters a graph error (caught and skipped)

postconditions: Returns empty list if G has 0 nodes
Returns at most max_paths prime paths
Path length is capped at min(G.number_of_nodes(), 15)
All paths have length >= 2
No duplicate paths in result

functions.name: analyze
functions.description: Phase 3 entry point: Analyzes the site graph by building networkx representation, computing metrics, finding broken links, auth violations, timing outliers, prime paths, and integrating security findings from webprobe.security.scan_graph.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The complete site graph to analyze

postconditions: PhaseStatus.phase = 'analyze'
PhaseStatus.status = 'completed' on success
PhaseStatus.duration_ms is set to elapsed time in milliseconds
AnalysisResult contains all analysis components: graph_metrics, broken_links, auth_violations, timing_outliers, prime_paths, security_findings

structured_side_effects.description: Updates phase status with completion time

invariants: Path length cutoff is min(n_nodes, 15) for prime path enumeration
Broken link detection considers HTTP 200-399 as success
Auth violation detection considers HTTP 200-299 as successful access
Edge coverage is always in range [0.0, 1.0]

data_access.rationale: Reads graph structure and metadata to perform analysis; does not modify input data
